snippets.title: Parse various date formats
snippets.description: Convert different date formats to YYYYMMDD
snippets.code:
import { parseToYYYYMMDD } from '@moneyworks/utilities';

const date1 = parseToYYYYMMDD('20240703');      // YYYYMMDD
const date2 = parseToYYYYMMDD('2024-07-03');    // ISO
const date3 = parseToYYYYMMDD('2024/07/03');    // Slash
const date4 = parseToYYYYMMDD(new Date());      // Date object
